popularStory.description: Philippa of Hainault (24 June[1] 1314 – 15 August 1369) was Queen of England as the wife of King Edward III.[2] Edward, Duke of Guyenne, her future husband, promised in 1326 to marry her within the fo …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa de Hainault Queen of England於1313年6月24日出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯時，她的父親Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande26歲，母親Jeanne de Valois23歲。她於1328年1月24日與King Edward III of England在英國英格蘭越可爾約克約克 明斯特結婚。她去世於1369年8月15日在英國波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素享年56歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa de Hainault Queen of England于1313年6月24日出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯时，她的父亲Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande26岁，母亲Jeanne de Valois23岁。她于1328年1月24日与King Edward III of England在英国英格兰越可爾約克約克 明斯特结婚。她去世于1369年8月15日在英国波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素享年56岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa de Hainault Queen of England was born on 24 June 1313, in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, was 26 and her mother, Jeanne de Valois, was 23. She married King Edward III of England on 24 January 1328, in York Minster, York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She died on 15 August 1369, in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

fr.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: York Minster, York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa de Hainault Queen of England est née le 24 juin 1313, à Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Valois, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé King Edward III of England le 24 janvier 1328, à York Minster, York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 15 août 1369, à Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: York Minster, York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa de Hainault Queen of England am 24. Juni 1313 in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande 26 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Valois 23. Sie hat am 24. Januar 1328 in York Minster, York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom King Edward III of England geheiratet. Sie starb am 15. August 1369 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England und wurde in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa de Hainault Queen of England è nata il il 24 giugno 1313 nel Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Valois, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato King Edward III of England il 24 gennaio 1328, nel York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 15 agosto 1369, nel Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa de Hainault Queen of Englandが1313年6月24日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードベレンシエンスで生まれた時，父Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollandeは26歳，母Jeanne de Valoisは23歳であった。1328年1月24日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークヨーク ミンスターでKing Edward III of Englandと結婚した。彼女は1369年8月15日にイギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソル カストルで56歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターウエストミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크 요르크 민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Philippa de Hainault Queen of England(이)가 1313년 6월 24일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 발시네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Valois(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1328년 1월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크 요르크 민스터에서 King Edward III of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1369년 8월 15일 영국 버크실르 윈드소르 카스틀에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa de Hainault Queen of England nasceu em 24 de junho de 1313, em Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Valois, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com King Edward III of England em 24 de janeiro de 1328, em York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1369, em Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ro.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: ерк минстир, ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa de Hainault Queen of England родилась 24 июня 1313 г. в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Valois, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Edward III of England 24 января 1328 г. в местности ерк минстир, ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 15 августа 1369 г. в местности виндзор кастл, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa de Hainault Queen of England nació el 24 de junio de 1313, en Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Valois, tenía 23 años. Se casó con King Edward III of England el 24 de enero de 1328, en York Minster, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1369, en Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
